items.text:
Dear Student,
My office hours this week have changed. I will be available on Tuesday from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM only. Please email me to confirm a time slot.
Best,
Dr. Park

questions.stem: According to the email, what is the change regarding Dr. Park's schedule?

options.A: Office hours are limited to Tuesday morning this week
options.B: Office hours have been canceled for the entire week
options.C: Office hours are extended to include Wednesday as well
options.D: Office hours will now be held in a different building

questions.explanation: The email states office hours are changed to Tuesday from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM only.

questions.stem: What does the email ask the student to do?

options.A: To drop by the office without prior notice
options.B: To submit a written request for an appointment
options.C: To call the department for scheduling assistance
options.D: To send an email to confirm a meeting time

questions.explanation: The email explicitly says 'Please email me to confirm a time slot.'
